packs.name: System Reference Document 5.2.1
packs.attribution: Wizards of the Coast open rules content
packs.summary: Open baseline spell and beast content generated through the repo-managed content-pack pipeline.

entries.name: Black Bear
entries.attribution: Wizards of the Coast open rules content
entries.summary: A sturdy beast that mauls nearby targets with tooth and claw.
entries.searchText: black bear creature a sturdy beast that mauls nearby targets with tooth and claw. beast cr 1/2 land melee druid form medium beast 1/2 11 19 (3d8 + 6) 40 ft., climb 30 ft. 15 10 14 2 12 7 perception +3 passive perception 13 keen smell multiattack: make one bite attack and one claw attack. bite: a solid melee hit that deals piercing damage. claws: a heavier swipe that deals slashing damage. forest hill true

actions: Multiattack: make one bite attack and one claw attack.
Bite: a solid melee hit that deals piercing damage.
Claws: a heavier swipe that deals slashing damage.

entries.name: Bless
entries.attribution: Wizards of the Coast open rules content
entries.summary: A concentration spell that increases allies' attack rolls and saving throws.
entries.searchText: bless spell a concentration spell that increases allies' attack rolls and saving throws. level 1 buff cleric paladin concentration support 1 enchantment cleric paladin action 30 feet concentration, up to 1 minute true

entries.name: Cure Wounds
entries.attribution: Wizards of the Coast open rules content
entries.summary: A staple restorative spell that heals a creature through divine or primal magic.
entries.searchText:
cure wounds spell a staple restorative spell that heals a creature through divine or primal magic. level 1 healing bard cleric druid paladin ranger support abjuration 1 abjuration bard cleric druid paladin ranger action touch instantaneous 1d8 + spellcasting modifier you channel restorative magic through a touch, knitting injuries closed in a single burst of healing. the target regains hit points immediately.

this is the baseline close-range healing spell for many divine and primal casters, and stronger spell slots increase the amount restored.

payload.description:
You channel restorative magic through a touch, knitting injuries closed in a single burst of healing. The target regains hit points immediately.

This is the baseline close-range healing spell for many divine and primal casters, and stronger spell slots increase the amount restored.

entries.name: Detect Magic
entries.attribution: Wizards of the Coast open rules content
entries.summary: A ritual-friendly utility spell for sensing the presence of magic nearby.
entries.searchText: detect magic spell a ritual-friendly utility spell for sensing the presence of magic nearby. level 1 divination bard cleric druid paladin ranger sorcerer warlock wizard ritual utility 1 divination bard cleric druid paladin ranger sorcerer warlock wizard action self concentration, up to 10 minutes true true

entries.name: Druidcraft
entries.attribution: Wizards of the Coast open rules content
entries.summary: A primal utility cantrip for small natural omens and minor sensory effects.
entries.searchText: druidcraft spell a primal utility cantrip for small natural omens and minor sensory effects. cantrip transmutation druid primal utility 0 transmutation druid action 30 feet instantaneous

entries.name: Eldritch Blast
entries.attribution: Wizards of the Coast open rules content
entries.summary: A force cantrip that fires a ranged beam and scales into multiple blasts with level.
entries.searchText: eldritch blast spell a force cantrip that fires a ranged beam and scales into multiple blasts with level. cantrip evocation warlock force spell attack 0 evocation warlock action 120 feet instantaneous spellattack 1d10 force

entries.name: Fire Bolt
entries.attribution: Wizards of the Coast open rules content
entries.summary: A ranged attack cantrip that deals fire damage and scales with character level.
entries.searchText:
fire bolt spell a ranged attack cantrip that deals fire damage and scales with character level. cantrip evocation attack wizard sorcerer arcane fire 0 evocation sorcerer wizard action 120 feet instantaneous spellattack 1d10 fire you hurl a compact burst of magical flame at one creature or unattended object in range. resolve it as a ranged spell attack; on a hit, the target takes fire damage.

as your level rises, the bolt grows stronger and remains a reliable ranged damage option for arcane casters.

payload.description:
You hurl a compact burst of magical flame at one creature or unattended object in range. Resolve it as a ranged spell attack; on a hit, the target takes fire damage.

As your level rises, the bolt grows stronger and remains a reliable ranged damage option for arcane casters.

entries.name: Giant Spider
entries.attribution: Wizards of the Coast open rules content
entries.summary: An ambush predator that climbs with ease and threatens foes with webbing and venom.
entries.searchText: giant spider creature an ambush predator that climbs with ease and threatens foes with webbing and venom. beast cr 1 climb poison web druid form large beast 1 14 26 (4d10 + 4) 30 ft., climb 30 ft. 14 16 12 2 11 4 stealth +7 blindsight 10 ft. darkvision 60 ft. passive perception 10 spider climb web sense web walker bite: a venomous melee strike that deals piercing damage plus poison. web: a ranged restraint option that can pin a target in place until it breaks free. forest underdark true giant spiders thrive as ambush hunters. their web control and venom make them useful examples for future beast-form browsing because they are more than a simple melee stat block.

actions: Bite: a venomous melee strike that deals piercing damage plus poison.
Web: a ranged restraint option that can pin a target in place until it breaks free.
payload.description: Giant spiders thrive as ambush hunters. Their web control and venom make them useful examples for future beast-form browsing because they are more than a simple melee stat block.

entries.name: Guidance
entries.attribution: Wizards of the Coast open rules content
entries.summary: A support cantrip that boosts a future check with a small divine bonus.
entries.searchText: guidance spell a support cantrip that boosts a future check with a small divine bonus. cantrip support cleric druid divine primal check bonus 0 divination cleric druid action touch concentration, up to 1 minute true

entries.name: Guiding Bolt
entries.attribution: Wizards of the Coast open rules content
entries.summary: A ranged radiant spell attack that also helps the next allied attack land.
entries.searchText: guiding bolt spell a ranged radiant spell attack that also helps the next allied attack land. level 1 radiant cleric spell attack support damage 1 evocation cleric action 120 feet 1 round rider spellattack 4d6 radiant

entries.searchText: hex spell a curse that adds extra damage to attacks and hampers one chosen ability. level 1 enchantment warlock curse concentration 1 enchantment warlock bonus action 90 feet concentration, up to 1 hour true

entries.name: Light

entries.searchText: light spell a utility cantrip that causes an object to emit bright light for an extended period. cantrip utility bard cleric sorcerer wizard illumination 0 evocation bard cleric sorcerer wizard action touch 1 hour

entries.name: Mage Armor
entries.attribution: Wizards of the Coast open rules content
entries.summary: A defensive spell that sets a stronger baseline AC for an unarmored target.
entries.searchText: mage armor spell a defensive spell that sets a stronger baseline ac for an unarmored target. level 1 abjuration sorcerer wizard armor class defense 1 abjuration sorcerer wizard action touch 8 hours base ac becomes 13 + dexterity modifier while unarmored

payload.effect: Base AC becomes 13 + Dexterity modifier while unarmored

entries.name: Mage Hand
entries.attribution: Wizards of the Coast open rules content
entries.summary: A utility cantrip that creates a spectral hand for simple remote manipulation.
entries.searchText: mage hand spell a utility cantrip that creates a spectral hand for simple remote manipulation. cantrip utility bard warlock wizard arcane spectral hand 0 conjuration bard warlock wizard action 30 feet 1 minute

entries.name: Magic Missile
entries.attribution: Wizards of the Coast open rules content
entries.summary: A dependable arcane spell that creates force darts which do not rely on an attack roll.
entries.searchText: magic missile spell a dependable arcane spell that creates force darts which do not rely on an attack roll. level 1 evocation sorcerer wizard force reliable damage 1 evocation sorcerer wizard action 120 feet instantaneous 3 darts of force

entries.name: Misty Step
entries.attribution: Wizards of the Coast open rules content
entries.summary: A short-range teleport that provides rapid repositioning as a bonus action.
entries.searchText:
misty step spell a short-range teleport that provides rapid repositioning as a bonus action. level 2 conjuration sorcerer warlock wizard mobility teleport 2 conjuration sorcerer warlock wizard bonus action self instantaneous briefly wrap yourself in silvery magic and reappear a short distance away. the movement is instantaneous and does not require crossing the space between the start and end points.

because it uses only a bonus action, the spell is a strong emergency repositioning tool.

payload.description:
Briefly wrap yourself in silvery magic and reappear a short distance away. The movement is instantaneous and does not require crossing the space between the start and end points.

Because it uses only a bonus action, the spell is a strong emergency repositioning tool.

entries.name: Panther
entries.attribution: Wizards of the Coast open rules content
entries.summary: A stealthy pouncer built for rapid movement and sudden takedowns.
entries.searchText: panther creature a stealthy pouncer built for rapid movement and sudden takedowns. beast cr 1/4 stealth pounce druid form medium beast 1/4 12 13 (3d8) 50 ft., climb 40 ft. 14 15 10 3 14 7 perception +4 stealth +6 passive perception 14 keen smell pounce bite: a quick melee strike that becomes more dangerous after a successful pounce. forest jungle true

actions: Bite: a quick melee strike that becomes more dangerous after a successful pounce.

entries.summary: A radiant cantrip that forces a saving throw instead of a spell attack roll.

entries.name: Shield of Faith
entries.attribution: Wizards of the Coast open rules content
entries.summary: A protective ward that boosts a creature's Armor Class while concentration holds.
entries.searchText: shield of faith spell a protective ward that boosts a creature's armor class while concentration holds. level 1 abjuration cleric paladin armor class concentration 1 abjuration cleric paladin bonus action 60 feet concentration, up to 10 minutes true +2 bonus to armor class

entries.name: Sleep
entries.attribution: Wizards of the Coast open rules content
entries.summary: An arcane control spell that can knock weaker creatures unconscious.
entries.searchText: sleep spell an arcane control spell that can knock weaker creatures unconscious. level 1 enchantment bard sorcerer wizard control incapacitate 1 enchantment bard sorcerer wizard action 90 feet 1 minute you release a wave of drowsy magic centered on a point in range. the spell affects creatures with the lowest current hit points first until its pool is spent. casting with a higher-level slot expands the total hit points that can be put to sleep.

payload.description: You release a wave of drowsy magic centered on a point in range. The spell affects creatures with the lowest current hit points first until its pool is spent.
payload.higherLevel: Casting with a higher-level slot expands the total hit points that can be put to sleep.

entries.name: Vicious Mockery
entries.attribution: Wizards of the Coast open rules content
entries.summary: A cutting insult that deals psychic damage and hinders the target's next attack.
entries.searchText: vicious mockery spell a cutting insult that deals psychic damage and hinders the target's next attack. cantrip enchantment bard psychic save 0 enchantment bard action 60 feet instantaneous save wisdom 1d6 psychic

entries.name: Wolf
entries.attribution: Wizards of the Coast open rules content
entries.summary: A swift hunting beast with pack tactics and a punishing bite.
entries.searchText: wolf creature a swift hunting beast with pack tactics and a punishing bite. beast cr 1/4 pack tactics keen hearing keen smell druid form medium beast 1/4 13 11 (2d8 + 2) 40 ft. 12 15 12 3 12 6 perception +3 stealth +4 passive perception 13 keen hearing and smell pack tactics bite: a melee strike that deals piercing damage and can drag a smaller target to the ground. forest grassland tundra true a wolf entry is a good baseline beast-form candidate because it combines speed, pack tactics, and a straightforward control rider on its bite.

actions: Bite: a melee strike that deals piercing damage and can drag a smaller target to the ground.
payload.description: A wolf entry is a good baseline beast-form candidate because it combines speed, pack tactics, and a straightforward control rider on its bite.
